name: 2'x3' Comfort Mat Floral Accent Rug Sage Green - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your living space with the chic and functional Comfort Mat Floral Accent Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular accent rug showcases a floral pattern on a sage green backdrop for a charming look that blends well with any decor aesthetic. Featuring a woven polyester construction for soft comfort underfoot, the accent rug also has a low-pile construction, making it perfect for high-traffic areas like your living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
